# Backus Upscaling

**Summary**: A method to upscale well log data to a resolution comparable with seismic data.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2020-almumtin|Almumtin, 2020]] applied backus-upscaling to verify the model's validity at the seismic scale.

## Key Results and Findings

- The Backus-upscaled curves are in good agreement with original log curves, confirming that the RPM is valid at the seismic scale. ([[2020-almumtin|Almumtin, 2020, p. 53]])
